function.name: summarizeToolResults
function.description: Summarize the previous tool or skill outputs and end the current Agent planning phase.

SummaryTools.description: A concise natural-language summary of the important tool or skill outputs that should be reflected in the final reply.

ReachedMaxToolCalls.description: Whether the Agent is ending because the maximum tool-call limit was reached.

ProcedureSummary.description: Optional. A concise shortcut summary of the operation performed, optimized for reuse next time. Distill multi-step paths into the minimal steps needed. Preserve concrete URLs and key parameters. Example: '播放网易云我喜欢的音乐 → browserNavigate(url="https://music.163.com/#/my/m/music/playlist?id=465711932") → 点击播放'. Leave empty for simple tasks that don't need to be remembered (e.g. weather queries).

PreviousProcedureId.description: Optional. The id of a previously learned procedure that was used in this task (returned by searchLearnedProcedures). When provided, the system will update that procedure with the new ProcedureSummary instead of creating a duplicate.
